oh my bad lol- I'm also a lil new too so I don't have G Ramona <:dead:1356082627509092372>
people just run ryker because he has a 1 cost demonic tutor
and draws a bunch of cards by existing
hes the best support for characters that want to draw a specific card like tawil
see that's funny cuz I benched him in favor of Tawil lol
but I can see why you'd run them both together
you could have kathigu-ra, ogier, and 2 empty slots
im saying it doesnt matter who you put in the team because kath will carry
but flare said poof is good in this com
thats why the video says it's "cheapest a5 capable team"
in terms of teammates that actually improve the comp though
You basically rarely want to play any card that doesn't belong to kath, because you need to play with her fiamma gimmick
so you want characters who provide bonuses just by existing, and don't demand a lot of your arithmetica
good example is Karen who just has cards that stay in your hand until you need them, and actually gives extra arith with her exalt
(not that you will ever need karen's cards tbh)
The meta support is clementine because she gives like 20 strength per turn and a whole bunch of utility that kath doesn't have
So ryker is mid i would say
he doesn't really do anything for kath
like i said earlier he only draws cards
ngl upgrading clem as we speak cuz of this--cuz it sounds like she'd boast the dps my pollux and castor duo does
Horla and Ham should be the other 2 if u have them
Still Clem is a good choice👍
clems dps increase is from her symbiosis stack into exalt more than the strength stacking
which means you want e3 so that you hve 15 symbiosis cap instead of 10
but stacking 15 also means you use her card to leap which also means you sacrifice castor's onyx plume numbers in the deck

i feel horla with anger emotion and her exalt is a more direct dps boost cause she doesnt interfere with castor's need for leap and her exalt gives very high crit chance and crit dmg boost to pollux and castor
Don’t you only need to leap with Clem for Str?
If so you don’t have to use her first
str is half the point of putting clem on your team though
if you dont leap with clem then her cards suck
